'''zhazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hydrostatically|hydrostatically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-zh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hydrostatically|hydrostatically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhazhate|zhazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhazhatesher|zhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazhatesherĂ«m|zhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhazhatero|zhazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhazhateshĂ«|zhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazhateshĂ«m|zhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhazhatero|gokizhazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhazhateshĂ«|gokizhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazhateshĂ«m|gokizhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhazhankerom|gozhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhazhankeshĂ«|gozhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhazhankeshĂ«m|gozhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhazhankeya|gozhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhazhaterom|zhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazhatemu|zhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhazhateya|zhazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhazhaterom|gokizhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazhatemu|gokizhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhazhateya|gokizhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhazhazhate|zhazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhazhazhatesher|zhazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazhazhatesherĂ«m|zhazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhazhazhatero|zhazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhazhazhateshĂ«|zhazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazhazhateshĂ«m|zhazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhazhazhatero|gokizhazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhazhazhateshĂ«|gokizhazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazhazhateshĂ«m|gokizhazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhazhazhankerom|gozhazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhazhazhankeshĂ«|gozhazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhazhazhankeshĂ«m|gozhazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhazhazhankeya|gozhazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhazhazhaterom|zhazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazhazhatemu|zhazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhazhazhateya|zhazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhazhazhaterom|gokizhazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazhazhatemu|gokizhazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhazhazhateya|gokizhazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠzhĂŠte|zhĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠzhĂŠtesher|zhĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠzhĂŠtero|zhĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠzhĂŠterom|zhĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠzhĂŠtemu|zhĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠzhĂŠteya|zhĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafzhafte|zhafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafzhaftesher|zhafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafzhaftesherĂ«m|zhafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafzhaftero|zhafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafzhafteshĂ«|zhafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafzhafteshĂ«m|zhafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafzhaftero|gokizhafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafzhafteshĂ«|gokizhafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafzhafteshĂ«m|gokizhafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafzhafnkerom|gozhafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafzhafnkeshĂ«|gozhafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafzhafnkeya|gozhafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafzhafterom|zhafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafzhaftemu|zhafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafzhafteya|zhafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafzhafterom|gokizhafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafzhaftemu|gokizhafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafzhafteya|gokizhafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
